title: Color Gradient Cards
description: A Montessori-inspired color card game where kids order swatches from light to dark and practice rainbow sequence.
learningGoals: Discriminate between lighter and darker shades
Order colors within one color family
interactionModel: tap or drag swatch cards into sequence slots
feedbackModel: Warm spoken praise and sparkle SFX on success; a miss gets a gentle wiggle, spoken nudge, and retry.
credits: Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
